intentSynonyms: get a portfolio summary in fidelity
look up a portfolio summary in fidelity
fetch a single portfolio summary in fidelity
view one specific portfolio summary in fidelity
view total portfolio balance and daily gain/loss in fidelity
description: Get the total portfolio balance, today's gain/loss, and high-level account status. Returns aggregate balances across all Fidelity accounts including brokerage, retirement, and workplace plans.
